name: Varang
description:
Heed the dead dove warning, Varang canonically uses non-con mind-control on others.

Starters include:
Na'vi POV of a forest ambush
Human POV of a forest ambush
Na'vi POV of a village raid
Reef Na'vi POV village raid
Any POV meeting Varang in her yurt
Recom POV of a forest ambush

All starter messages were written with Claude.

My Varang currently DOES NOT speak accurate Na'vi. But you know who will? (Disclaimer: As much as LLMs possibly can, errors will still occur) kdcoakqe3130i5 reuploaded Varang with my full permission to give her access to the Na'vi language. Seriously, I can't hype up that Na'vi language lorebook enough. Go check the chatbot out for yourself!

UPDATES

11/8/25 - Updated with additional character parameters to ensure Varang doesn't become mischaracterized with hesitation, remorse, or pity. She is ruthless and I aim to portray that accurately.
12/11/25 - Added dialogue examples to hopefully diversify how Varang responds. Hopefully this will have her speak about more than "fire" or "Eywa" like a one note character. Please let me know in the comments if there is improvement or not.
12/18/25 - Fresh out of the theater, this is my favorite of the three movies. I added some tweaks to hopefully help Varang stay in character, but I already managed to get her 95% there prior to the movie. (tweaked these changes on 12/19/25, not enough for a full update tab, I just forgot a couple of details.)
01/01/26 - HAPPY NEW YEAR! I was going to wait until Varang took the spot at my most used chatbot to celebrate, but decided instead to release a lore book to assist the chatbot at 60k messages and as a new year treat. Lore book includes information on the Mangkwan as well as a handful of side characters. Generation is somewhat wonky with default j.llm but I am pleased to say the results I had while testing were decent. Lore book is still a WIP, but only in filling out profiles for side characters. Enjoy!
01/01/26 - Added a small tsaheylu lorebook to hopefully polish up LLM generation. My tests with Varang were fantastic with gemini. Let me know if there are major errors that occur with Varang. This shouldn't cause her to become soft, the lorebook has a section specifically for how the Mangkwan approach it so that could assist in keeping her from being soft, but LLMs be LLMs and it may happen anyways so give an OOC nudge if she starts behaving wonky.
01/13/25 - Read the newly added "important note" below. DO NOT dig through my chatbot to find "errors", just let me know what errors happen in chat and I will try to fix them if I think I can. LLMs be LLMs so it's not a guarantee. Thanks to someone digging through my chatbot, it spurred me into noticing some typos I made and also to make some tweaks to Varang's speech and personality to make the stolen version obsolete. Additionally, I made some other miscellaneous attempts to clarify some details. Reminder that all APIs are going to behave differently, and there's only so much that can be done to ensure characterization stays accurate without Varang turning "soft" or out of character. OOC is still going to happen. Just let me know if any major errors happen.

- Additional edit: Not to the chatbot but to the profile card. I realized it was getting to be a bit of a mess, swapped some things around, tried to make it easier to read.

01/25/26 - Not an
creator: mogshade
